reportCadence.noChangeReports: skip unless a later exact human-approved task packet requests a report

requestHandling: Phone edits create requests only. They do not execute Codex, approve work, update mission files automatically, touch product repos, run all-fleet commands, run overnight runners, stage, commit, push, deploy, install packages, run migrations, handle secrets, delete locks, widen permissions, configure remote access, approve phone actions, or bind runtime commands.
emergency: Set Emergency: REQUEST_STOP in fleet/control/emergency.md to request a cooperative stop signal for later safe handling. This is not arbitrary command execution.
